evidence: Canon roadmap states INF-FULL-02 pass transitions to INF-FULL-03 as an operator-gated infernus_full phase.
INF-FULL-03 depends on baseline_freeze_planned=true and baseline_freeze_applied=false.
Scoped modules and quarantine modules are already enumerated and remain the source set for downstream contract packs.
The v1 bot matrix provides the canonical bot roster to be normalized into the INF-FULL-03 contract pack.
Wave definitions and stop conditions are reused as planning inputs only; no wave is executed in INF-FULL-03.
